title: CMD.REF.001.BEN.UPDATE_BENEFICIARY_IDENTITY — Apply a partial update to a beneficiary's identity
description: Payload of the UPDATE_BENEFICIARY_IDENTITY command. Partial-update semantics: only fields present in the payload are mutated; absent fields are left unchanged (sticky-PII rule, INV.BEN.003). Emits one RVT.REF.001.BENEFICIARY_REFERENTIAL_UPDATED with transition_kind=UPDATED. Idempotent on command_id over a 30-day window.

contact_details_patch.description: Partial contact_details patch. Only present sub-objects are mutated.

internal_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Canonical identifier of the beneficiary to update.

command_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Caller-generated unique identifier of this command invocation (deduplicated for 30 days).

last_name.description: Optional. New legal last name (rare; e.g. legal change).

first_name.description: Optional. New first name (rare; e.g. legal change).
